title: Monday.com CRM solution webinar

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Heya! I want to invite everyone to a free webinar I’m hosting with one of monday’s solution engineers showcasing their CRM solution!

It’s a 1-hour free webinar on Monday, 12th Sept at 3pm EST.

If you want to join us, please register here.
